toolUseResult.originalFile:
"""Detecteur de CMS â€” fingerprinting rapide (headers, meta, patterns).

Avant de chercher le sitemap, on detecte le CMS pour :
1. Savoir exactement ou chercher le sitemap (PrestaShop â‰  WordPress â‰  Shopify)
2. Adapter les recommandations d'audit
3. Enrichir le rapport avec le contexte technique

$0 â€” pas de LLM, pas d'API. Headers HTTP + balises meta + patterns HTML.
"""

import re
from typing import Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

import httpx

# Signatures CMS : (nom, [(type, pattern, poids)])
CMS_SIGNATURES = {
    "PrestaShop": [
        ("header", r"PrestaShop", 50),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="PrestaShop', 40),
        ("cookie", r"PrestaShop-[a-f0-9]{32}", 50),
        ("html", r"/modules/|/themes/|prestashop", 30),
        ("sitemap", r"/\d+_index_sitemap\.xml", 30),
        ("sitemap", r"/\d+_fr_\d+_sitemap\.xml", 25),
    ],
    "WordPress": [
        ("header", r"X-Powered-By:.*WordPress", 40),
        ("meta", r'wp-content|wordpress', 40),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/|/wp-includes/|/wp-json/", 30),
        ("file", r"/wp-login\.php", 20),
        ("sitemap", r"/wp-sitemap\.xml|/sitemap_index\.xml", 20),
    ],
    "Shopify": [
        ("meta", r"Shopify\.shop|shopify\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"myshopify\.com|cdn\.shopify\.com", 30),
        ("cookie", r"_shopify_", 20),
    ],
    "WooCommerce": [
        ("meta", r"WooCommerce", 30),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/plugins/woocommerce", 20),
        ("html", r"woocommerce", 15),
    ],
    "Magento": [
        ("meta", r"Magento", 40),
        ("html", r"/static/version\d+/|/pub/static/", 30),
        ("cookie", r"mage-", 20),
    ],
    "Drupal": [
        ("header", r"X-Drupal-", 40),
        ("meta", r"Drupal", 40),
        ("html", r"/sites/default/|/modules/contrib/", 20),
    ],
    "Joomla": [
        ("meta", r"Joomla!", 40),
        ("html", r"/components/com_|/modules/mod_", 20),
    ],
    "Wix": [
        ("meta", r"Wix\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"wix\.com|static\.wixstatic\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Squarespace": [
        ("meta", r"Squarespace", 40),
        ("html", r"squarespace\.com|static1\.squarespace\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Webflow": [
        ("meta", r"Webflow", 40),
        ("html", r"webflow\.com|assets\.website-files\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Ghost": [
        ("meta", r"Ghost", 40),
        ("html", r"/ghost/|/content/themes/", 20),
    ],
}

# Mapping CMS â†’ candidats sitemap prioritaires
CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY = {
    "PrestaShop": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", "/2_index_sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml"],
    "WordPress": ["/wp-sitemap.xml", "/sitemap_index.xml", "/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap-index.xml"],
    "Shopify": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Magento": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap/sitemap.xml"],
    "Drupal": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Joomla": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml?format=xml"],
    "Wix": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Squarespace": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Webflow": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Ghost": ["/sitemap.xml"],
}


async def detect_cms(url: str) -> dict:
    """Detecte le CMS d'un site web.

    Args:
        url: URL du site (https://...)

    Returns: {
        "cms": "PrestaShop" | "WordPress" | "..." | "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0-100,
        "signals": [{"type": "header", "pattern": "PrestaShop", "weight": 50}, ...],
        "sitemap_candidates": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", ...] | [],
        "version": "8.1" | null,
    }
    """
    result = {
        "cms": "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0,
        "signals": [],
        "sitemap_candidates": [],
        "version": None,
    }

    if not url.startswith("http"):
        url = f"https://{url}"

    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
            # 1. HEAD pour les headers
            headers_data = {}
            try:
                head_resp = await client.head(url)
                headers_data = dict(head_resp.headers)
                # Recuperer le corps du HEAD
            except Exception:
                pass

            # 2. GET pour le HTML (meta, patterns)
            resp = await client.get(url)
            if resp.status_code != 200:
                return result
            html = resp.text
            all_headers = str(resp.headers)
            # httpx stocke plusieurs Set-Cookie comme liste
            cookies_raw = resp.headers.get("set-cookie", "")
            all_cookies = "; ".join(resp.headers.get_list("set-cookie")) if hasattr(resp.headers, "get_list") else cookies_raw

        # 3. Scorer chaque CMS
        scores = {}
        for cms_name, signatures in CMS_SIGNATURES.items():
            score = 0
            found_signals = []
            for sig_type, pattern, weight in signatures:
                matched = False
                if sig_type == "header":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, all_headers, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "meta":
                    matched = bool(re.search(
                        rf'<meta[^>]*{pattern}',
                        html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
                    ))
                elif sig_type == "html":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, html[:10000], re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "cookie":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, all_cookies, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "file":
                    try:
                        file_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        file_resp = await client.head(file_url)
                        matched = file_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass
                elif sig_type == "sitemap":
                    try:
                        sitemap_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        sitemap_resp = await client.head(sitemap_url)
                        matched = sitemap_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass

                if matched:
                    score += weight
                    found_signals.append({
                        "type": sig_type,
                        "pattern": pattern[:60],
                        "weight": weight,
                    })

            if score > 0:
                scores[cms_name] = {"score": score, "signals": found_signals}

        # 4. Meilleur match
        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

    "Joomla": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml?format=xml"],
    "Wix": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Squarespace": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Webflow": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Ghost": ["/sitemap.xml"],
}


async def detect_cms(url: str) -> dict:
    """Detecte le CMS d'un site web.

    Args:
        url: URL du site (https://...)

    Returns: {
        "cms": "PrestaShop" | "WordPress" | "..." | "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0-100,
        "signals": [{"type": "header", "pattern": "PrestaShop", "weight": 50}, ...],
        "sitemap_candidates": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", ...] | [],
        "version": "8.1" | null,
    }
    """
    result = {
        "cms": "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0,
        "signals": [],
        "sitemap_candidates": [],
        "version": None,
    }

    if not url.startswith("http"):
        url = f"https://{url}"

    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
            # 1. HEAD pour les headers
            headers_data = {}
            try:
                head_resp = await client.head(url)
                headers_data = dict(head_resp.headers)
                # Recuperer le corps du HEAD
            except Exception:
                pass

            # 2. GET pour le HTML (meta, patterns)
            resp = await client.get(url)
            if resp.status_code != 200:
                return result
            html = resp.text
            all_headers = str(resp.headers)
            # httpx stocke plusieurs Set-Cookie comme liste
            cookies_raw = resp.headers.get("set-cookie", "")
            all_cookies = "; ".join(resp.headers.get_list("set-cookie")) if hasattr(resp.headers, "get_list") else cookies_raw

        # 3. Scorer chaque CMS
        scores = {}
        for cms_name, signatures in CMS_SIGNATURES.items():
            score = 0
            found_signals = []
            for sig_type, pattern, weight in signatures:
                matched = False
                if sig_type == "header":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, all_headers, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "meta":
                    matched = bool(re.search(
                        rf'<meta[^>]*{pattern}',
                        html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
                    ))
                elif sig_type == "html":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, html[:10000], re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "cookie":
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, all_cookies, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "file":
                    try:
                        file_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        file_resp = await client.head(file_url)
                        matched = file_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass
                elif sig_type == "sitemap":
                    try:
                        sitemap_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        sitemap_resp = await client.head(sitemap_url)
                        matched = sitemap_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass

                if matched:
                    score += weight
                    found_signals.append({
                        "type": sig_type,
                        "pattern": pattern[:60],
                        "weight": weight,
                    })

            if score > 0:
                scores[cms_name] = {"score": score, "signals": found_signals}

        # 4. Meilleur match
        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

"""Detecteur de CMS â€” fingerprinting rapide (headers, meta, patterns).

Avant de chercher le sitemap, on detecte le CMS pour :
1. Savoir exactement ou chercher le sitemap (PrestaShop â‰  WordPress â‰  Shopify)
2. Adapter les recommandations d'audit
3. Enrichir le rapport avec le contexte technique

$0 â€” pas de LLM, pas d'API. Headers HTTP + balises meta + patterns HTML.
"""

import re
from typing import Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

import httpx

# Signatures CMS : (nom, [(type, pattern, poids)])
CMS_SIGNATURES = {
    "PrestaShop": [
        ("header", r"PrestaShop", 50),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="PrestaShop', 40),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="prestashop', 40),
        ("cookie", r"PrestaShop-[a-f0-9]{10,64}", 50),
        ("html", r"/modules/|/themes/|prestashop", 30),
        ("html", r"id="prestashop|class="prestashop|class="ps_", 20),
        ("html", r"prestashop\.com|addons\.prestashop", 15),
        ("sitemap", r"/\d+/_index_sitemap\.xml", 30),
    ],
    "WordPress": [
        ("header", r"X-Powered-By:.*WordPress", 40),
        ("meta", r'wp-content|wordpress', 40),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/|/wp-includes/|/wp-json/", 30),
        ("file", r"/wp-login\.php", 20),
        ("sitemap", r"/wp-sitemap\.xml|/sitemap_index\.xml", 20),
    ],
    "Shopify": [
        ("meta", r"Shopify\.shop|shopify\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"myshopify\.com|cdn\.shopify\.com", 30),
        ("cookie", r"_shopify_", 20),
    ],
    "WooCommerce": [
        ("meta", r"WooCommerce", 30),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/plugins/woocommerce", 20),
        ("html", r"woocommerce", 15),
    ],
    "Magento": [
        ("meta", r"Magento", 40),
        ("html", r"/static/version\d+/|/pub/static/", 30),
        ("cookie", r"mage-", 20),
    ],
    "Drupal": [
        ("header", r"X-Drupal-", 40),
        ("meta", r"Drupal", 40),
        ("html", r"/sites/default/|/modules/contrib/", 20),
    ],
    "Joomla": [
        ("meta", r"Joomla!", 40),
        ("html", r"/components/com_|/modules/mod_", 20),
    ],
    "Wix": [
        ("meta", r"Wix\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"wix\.com|static\.wixstatic\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Squarespace": [
        ("meta", r"Squarespace", 40),
        ("html", r"squarespace\.com|static1\.squarespace\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Webflow": [
        ("meta", r"Webflow", 40),
        ("html", r"webflow\.com|assets\.website-files\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Ghost": [
        ("meta", r"Ghost", 40),
        ("html", r"/ghost/|/content/themes/", 20),
    ],
}

# Mapping CMS â†’ candidats sitemap prioritaires
CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY = {
    "PrestaShop": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", "/2_index_sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml"],
    "WordPress": ["/wp-sitemap.xml", "/sitemap_index.xml", "/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap-index.xml"],
    "Shopify": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Magento": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap/sitemap.xml"],
    "Drupal": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Joomla": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml?format=xml"],
    "Wix": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Squarespace": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Webflow": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Ghost": ["/sitemap.xml"],
}


async def detect_cms(url: str) -> dict:
    """Detecte le CMS d'un site web.

    Args:
        url: URL du site (https://...)

    Returns: {
        "cms": "PrestaShop" | "WordPress" | "..." | "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0-100,
        "signals": [{"type": "header", "pattern": "PrestaShop", "weight": 50}, ...],
        "sitemap_candidates": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", ...] | [],
        "version": "8.1" | null,
    }
    """
    result = {
        "cms": "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0,
        "signals": [],
        "sitemap_candidates": [],
        "version": None,
    }

    if not url.startswith("http"):
        url = f"https://{url}"

    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
            # 1. HEAD pour les headers
            headers_data = {}
            try:
                head_resp = await client.head(url)
                headers_data = dict(head_resp.headers)
                # Recuperer le corps du HEAD
            except Exception:
                pass

            # 2. GET pour le HTML (meta, patterns)
            resp = await client.get(url)
            if resp.status_code != 200:
                return result
            html = resp.text
            all_headers = str(resp.headers)
            cookies_raw = resp.headers.get("set-cookie", "")
            all_cookies = "; ".join(resp.headers.get_list("set-cookie")) if hasattr(resp.headers, "get_list") else cookies_raw

            # 2.5 Robots.txt â€” source de signatures CMS (ex: "PrestaShop" dans le commentaire)
            robots_txt = ""
            try:
                robots_url = urljoin(url, "/robots.txt")
                robots_resp = await client.get(robots_url, headers={"User-Agent": "HermesAudit/1.0"})
                if robots_resp.status_code == 200:
                    robots_txt = robots_resp.text[:2000]
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Contenu combine pour les recherches
        combined_text = f"{all_headers}\n{html[:15000]}\n{robots_txt}"

        # 3. Scorer chaque CMS
        scores = {}
        for cms_name, signatures in CMS_SIGNATURES.items():
            score = 0
            found_signals = []
            for sig_type, pattern, weight in signatures:
                matched = False
                if sig_type in ("header", "html", "cookie", "meta"):
                    # Recherche dans le contenu combine (headers + HTML + robots.txt)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "file":
                    try:
                        file_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        file_resp = await client.head(file_url)
                        matched = file_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass
                elif sig_type == "sitemap":
                    # Chercher le pattern dans le HTML et robots.txt (pas comme URL)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))

                if matched:
                    score += weight
                    found_signals.append({
                        "type": sig_type,
                        "pattern": pattern[:60],
                        "weight": weight,
                    })

            if score > 0:
                scores[cms_name] = {"score": score, "signals": found_signals}

        # 4. Meilleur match
        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

"""Detecteur de CMS â€” fingerprinting rapide (headers, meta, patterns).

Avant de chercher le sitemap, on detecte le CMS pour :
1. Savoir exactement ou chercher le sitemap (PrestaShop â‰  WordPress â‰  Shopify)
2. Adapter les recommandations d'audit
3. Enrichir le rapport avec le contexte technique

$0 â€” pas de LLM, pas d'API. Headers HTTP + balises meta + patterns HTML.
"""

import re
from typing import Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

import httpx

# Signatures CMS : (nom, [(type, pattern, poids)])
CMS_SIGNATURES = {
    "PrestaShop": [
        ("header", r"PrestaShop", 50),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="PrestaShop', 40),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="prestashop', 40),
        ("cookie", r"PrestaShop-[a-f0-9]{10,64}", 50),
        ("html", r"/modules/|/themes/|prestashop", 30),
        ("html", r"id="prestashop|class="prestashop|class="ps_", 20),
        ("html", r"prestashop\.com|addons\.prestashop", 15),
        ("sitemap", r"/\d+/_index_sitemap\.xml", 30),
    ],
    "WordPress": [
        ("header", r"WordPress", 40),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/|/wp-includes/|/wp-json/|wordpress", 40),
        ("file", r"/wp-login\.php", 20),
        ("sitemap", r"/wp-sitemap\.xml|/sitemap_index\.xml", 20),
    ],
    "Shopify": [
        ("meta", r"Shopify\.shop|shopify\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"myshopify\.com|cdn\.shopify\.com", 30),
        ("cookie", r"_shopify_", 20),
    ],
    "WooCommerce": [
        ("meta", r"WooCommerce", 30),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/plugins/woocommerce", 20),
        ("html", r"woocommerce", 15),
    ],
    "Magento": [
        ("meta", r"Magento", 40),
        ("html", r"/static/version\d+/|/pub/static/", 30),
        ("cookie", r"mage-", 20),
    ],
    "Drupal": [
        ("header", r"X-Drupal-", 40),
        ("meta", r"Drupal", 40),
        ("html", r"/sites/default/|/modules/contrib/", 20),
    ],
    "Joomla": [
        ("meta", r"Joomla!", 40),
        ("html", r"/components/com_|/modules/mod_", 20),
    ],
    "Wix": [
        ("meta", r"Wix\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"wix\.com|static\.wixstatic\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Squarespace": [
        ("meta", r"Squarespace", 40),
        ("html", r"squarespace\.com|static1\.squarespace\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Webflow": [
        ("meta", r"Webflow", 40),
        ("html", r"webflow\.com|assets\.website-files\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Ghost": [
        ("meta", r"Ghost", 40),
        ("html", r"/ghost/|/content/themes/", 20),
    ],
}

# Mapping CMS â†’ candidats sitemap prioritaires
CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY = {
    "PrestaShop": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", "/2_index_sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml"],
    "WordPress": ["/wp-sitemap.xml", "/sitemap_index.xml", "/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap-index.xml"],
    "Shopify": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Magento": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap/sitemap.xml"],
    "Drupal": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Joomla": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml?format=xml"],
    "Wix": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Squarespace": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Webflow": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Ghost": ["/sitemap.xml"],
}


async def detect_cms(url: str) -> dict:
    """Detecte le CMS d'un site web.

    Args:
        url: URL du site (https://...)

    Returns: {
        "cms": "PrestaShop" | "WordPress" | "..." | "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0-100,
        "signals": [{"type": "header", "pattern": "PrestaShop", "weight": 50}, ...],
        "sitemap_candidates": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", ...] | [],
        "version": "8.1" | null,
    }
    """
    result = {
        "cms": "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0,
        "signals": [],
        "sitemap_candidates": [],
        "version": None,
    }

    if not url.startswith("http"):
        url = f"https://{url}"

    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
            # 1. HEAD pour les headers
            headers_data = {}
            try:
                head_resp = await client.head(url)
                headers_data = dict(head_resp.headers)
                # Recuperer le corps du HEAD
            except Exception:
                pass

            # 2. GET pour le HTML (meta, patterns)
            resp = await client.get(url)
            if resp.status_code != 200:
                return result
            html = resp.text
            all_headers = str(resp.headers)
            cookies_raw = resp.headers.get("set-cookie", "")
            all_cookies = "; ".join(resp.headers.get_list("set-cookie")) if hasattr(resp.headers, "get_list") else cookies_raw

            # 2.5 Robots.txt â€” source de signatures CMS (ex: "PrestaShop" dans le commentaire)
            robots_txt = ""
            try:
                robots_url = urljoin(url, "/robots.txt")
                robots_resp = await client.get(robots_url, headers={"User-Agent": "HermesAudit/1.0"})
                if robots_resp.status_code == 200:
                    robots_txt = robots_resp.text[:2000]
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Contenu combine pour les recherches
        combined_text = f"{all_headers}\n{html[:15000]}\n{robots_txt}"

        # 3. Scorer chaque CMS
        scores = {}
        for cms_name, signatures in CMS_SIGNATURES.items():
            score = 0
            found_signals = []
            for sig_type, pattern, weight in signatures:
                matched = False
                if sig_type in ("header", "html", "cookie", "meta"):
                    # Recherche dans le contenu combine (headers + HTML + robots.txt)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "file":
                    try:
                        file_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        file_resp = await client.head(file_url)
                        matched = file_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass
                elif sig_type == "sitemap":
                    # Chercher le pattern dans le HTML et robots.txt (pas comme URL)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))

                if matched:
                    score += weight
                    found_signals.append({
                        "type": sig_type,
                        "pattern": pattern[:60],
                        "weight": weight,
                    })

            if score > 0:
                scores[cms_name] = {"score": score, "signals": found_signals}

        # 4. Meilleur match
        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

import asyncio, sys, logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(levelname)s:%(name)s:%(message)s')

async def test():
    # Test CMS detection
    from hermes.connectors.cms_detector import detect_cms
    cms = await detect_cms('https://www.hartmann-tresore.fr')
    print(f'CMS: {cms[\"cms\"]} (conf={cms[\"confidence\"]}%, ver={cms.get(\"version\")})')
    print(f'Signals: {cms.get(\"signals\", [])}')
    print(f'Sitemap candidates: {cms.get(\"sitemap_candidates\", [])}')
    
    # Test sitemap detection
    from hermes.connectors.sitemap_parser import detect_sitemaps, parse_sitemap_recursive
    detected = await detect_sitemaps('https://www.hartmann-tresore.fr')
    print(f'Sitemap: found={detected[\"found\"]}, source={detected[\"source\"]}')
    if detected['found']:
        urls, types, meta = await parse_sitemap_recursive(detected['urls'], 'https://www.hartmann-tresore.fr', max_urls=20)
        print(f'URLs: {len(urls)}, types: {types}')
        print(f'Meta: {meta}')
        for u in urls[:5]:
            print(f'  {u}')

asyncio.run(test())

Interesting. The sitemap is found correctly (20 URLs), but CMS detection returns "inconnu". The issue is that both HEAD and GET to the homepage return HTTP 403 Forbidden. This means:

1. The CMS detector does a HEAD first, then a GET to the homepage URL
2. Both return 403
3. The code returns early: `if resp.status_code != 200: return result`

So the CMS detector can't access the homepage because of 403 Forbidden. This is likely Cloudflare or some WAF blocking the requests. We need to:

1. Make the CMS detector use better User-Agent headers
2. Add fallback: if the homepage is blocked, try to detect CMS from robots.txt or sitemap content

Let me also check: the robots.txt is accessible (200 OK) and contains "PrestaShop". So we can detect CMS from robots.txt.

Let me fix the CMS detector:
1. Add proper User-Agent header to the GET request
2. If the homepage returns 403, try to detect from robots.txt alone
3. Add detection from robots.txt content

Also, the sitemap parser works fine because it uses headers={"User-Agent": "HermesAudit/1.0"} but the CMS detector doesn't. Let me fix that.

"""Detecteur de CMS â€” fingerprinting rapide (headers, meta, patterns).

Avant de chercher le sitemap, on detecte le CMS pour :
1. Savoir exactement ou chercher le sitemap (PrestaShop â‰  WordPress â‰  Shopify)
2. Adapter les recommandations d'audit
3. Enrichir le rapport avec le contexte technique

$0 â€” pas de LLM, pas d'API. Headers HTTP + balises meta + patterns HTML.
"""

import re
from typing import Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

import httpx

# Signatures CMS : (nom, [(type, pattern, poids)])
CMS_SIGNATURES = {
    "PrestaShop": [
        ("header", r"PrestaShop", 50),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="PrestaShop', 40),
        ("meta", r'name="generator"[^>]*content="prestashop', 40),
        ("cookie", r"PrestaShop-[a-f0-9]{10,64}", 50),
        ("html", r"/modules/|/themes/|prestashop", 30),
        ("html", r'id="prestashop"|class="prestashop"|class="ps_"', 20),
        ("html", r"prestashop\.com|addons\.prestashop", 15),
        ("sitemap", r"/\d+/_index_sitemap\.xml", 30),
    ],
    "WordPress": [
        ("header", r"WordPress", 40),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/|/wp-includes/|/wp-json/|wordpress", 40),
        ("file", r"/wp-login\.php", 20),
        ("sitemap", r"/wp-sitemap\.xml|/sitemap_index\.xml", 20),
    ],
    "Shopify": [
        ("meta", r"Shopify\.shop|shopify\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"myshopify\.com|cdn\.shopify\.com", 30),
        ("cookie", r"_shopify_", 20),
    ],
    "WooCommerce": [
        ("meta", r"WooCommerce", 30),
        ("html", r"/wp-content/plugins/woocommerce", 20),
        ("html", r"woocommerce", 15),
    ],
    "Magento": [
        ("meta", r"Magento", 40),
        ("html", r"/static/version\d+/|/pub/static/", 30),
        ("cookie", r"mage-", 20),
    ],
    "Drupal": [
        ("header", r"X-Drupal-", 40),
        ("meta", r"Drupal", 40),
        ("html", r"/sites/default/|/modules/contrib/", 20),
    ],
    "Joomla": [
        ("meta", r"Joomla!", 40),
        ("html", r"/components/com_|/modules/mod_", 20),
    ],
    "Wix": [
        ("meta", r"Wix\.com", 40),
        ("html", r"wix\.com|static\.wixstatic\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Squarespace": [
        ("meta", r"Squarespace", 40),
        ("html", r"squarespace\.com|static1\.squarespace\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Webflow": [
        ("meta", r"Webflow", 40),
        ("html", r"webflow\.com|assets\.website-files\.com", 30),
    ],
    "Ghost": [
        ("meta", r"Ghost", 40),
        ("html", r"/ghost/|/content/themes/", 20),
    ],
}

# Mapping CMS â†’ candidats sitemap prioritaires
CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY = {
    "PrestaShop": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", "/2_index_sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml"],
    "WordPress": ["/wp-sitemap.xml", "/sitemap_index.xml", "/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap-index.xml"],
    "Shopify": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Magento": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap/sitemap.xml"],
    "Drupal": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Joomla": ["/sitemap.xml", "/sitemap.xml?format=xml"],
    "Wix": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Squarespace": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Webflow": ["/sitemap.xml"],
    "Ghost": ["/sitemap.xml"],
}


async def detect_cms(url: str) -> dict:
    """Detecte le CMS d'un site web.

    Args:
        url: URL du site (https://...)

    Returns: {
        "cms": "PrestaShop" | "WordPress" | "..." | "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0-100,
        "signals": [{"type": "header", "pattern": "PrestaShop", "weight": 50}, ...],
        "sitemap_candidates": ["/1_index_sitemap.xml", ...] | [],
        "version": "8.1" | null,
    }
    """
    result = {
        "cms": "inconnu",
        "confidence": 0,
        "signals": [],
        "sitemap_candidates": [],
        "version": None,
    }

    if not url.startswith("http"):
        url = f"https://{url}"

    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
            # 1. HEAD pour les headers
            headers_data = {}
            try:
                head_resp = await client.head(url)
                headers_data = dict(head_resp.headers)
                # Recuperer le corps du HEAD
            except Exception:
                pass

            # 2. GET pour le HTML (meta, patterns)
            resp = await client.get(url)
            if resp.status_code != 200:
                return result
            html = resp.text
            all_headers = str(resp.headers)
            cookies_raw = resp.headers.get("set-cookie", "")
            all_cookies = "; ".join(resp.headers.get_list("set-cookie")) if hasattr(resp.headers, "get_list") else cookies_raw

            # 2.5 Robots.txt â€” source de signatures CMS (ex: "PrestaShop" dans le commentaire)
            robots_txt = ""
            try:
                robots_url = urljoin(url, "/robots.txt")
                robots_resp = await client.get(robots_url, headers={"User-Agent": "HermesAudit/1.0"})
                if robots_resp.status_code == 200:
                    robots_txt = robots_resp.text[:2000]
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Contenu combine pour les recherches
        combined_text = f"{all_headers}\n{html[:15000]}\n{robots_txt}"

        # 3. Scorer chaque CMS
        scores = {}
        for cms_name, signatures in CMS_SIGNATURES.items():
            score = 0
            found_signals = []
            for sig_type, pattern, weight in signatures:
                matched = False
                if sig_type in ("header", "html", "cookie", "meta"):
                    # Recherche dans le contenu combine (headers + HTML + robots.txt)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))
                elif sig_type == "file":
                    try:
                        file_url = urljoin(url, pattern.lstrip("/"))
                        file_resp = await client.head(file_url)
                        matched = file_resp.status_code == 200
                    except Exception:
                        pass
                elif sig_type == "sitemap":
                    # Chercher le pattern dans le HTML et robots.txt (pas comme URL)
                    matched = bool(re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE))

                if matched:
                    score += weight
                    found_signals.append({
                        "type": sig_type,
                        "pattern": pattern[:60],
                        "weight": weight,
                    })

            if score > 0:
                scores[cms_name] = {"score": score, "signals": found_signals}

        # 4. Meilleur match
        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

        if scores:
            best = max(scores, key=lambda k: scores[k]["score"])
            result["cms"] = best
            result["confidence"] = min(100, scores[best]["score"])
            result["signals"] = scores[best]["signals"]
            result["sitemap_candidates"] = CMS_SITEMAP_PRIORITY.get(best, [])

            # Detection version (depuis meta generator)
            v_match = re.search(
                rf'{best}\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                html[:5000], re.IGNORECASE
            )
            if v_match:
                result["version"] = v_match.group(1)
            else:
                # PrestaShop: chercher dans le footer
                v_match = re.search(
                    r'(?:v|version|release)\s+(\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?)',
                    html[-2000:], re.IGNORECASE
                )
                if v_match:
                    result["version"] = v_match.group(1)

    except Exception as e:
        result["error"] = str(e)

    return result


def get_cms_sitemap_hint(cms_result: dict) -> str:
    """Retourne un message utilisateur indiquant ou trouver le sitemap."""
    cms = cms_result.get("cms", "inconnu")
    candidates = cms_result.get("sitemap_candidates", [])

    hints = {
        "PrestaShop": (
            f"Site PrestaShop detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap generalement a : {candidates[0] if candidates else '/1_index_sitemap.xml'} "
            f"(visible dans robots.txt). Les URLs produit/categorie sont generees automatiquement."
        ),
        "WordPress": (
            f"Site WordPress detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap a : /wp-sitemap.xml (WordPress 5.5+). "
            f"Verifier que Yoast SEO ou RankMath ne genere pas un sitemap different."
        ),
        "Shopify": (
            f"Site Shopify detecte (confiance {cms_result.get('confidence', 0)}%). "
            f"Sitemap automatique a : /sitemap.xml. "
            f"Shopify gere automatiquement les sitemaps produits, collections et pages."
        ),
    }
    return hints.get(cms, f"CMS detecte : {cms}. Sitemap probable : {', '.join(candidates)}")

"""Page Audit de Contenu â€” Streamlit UI. 5 modes d'entree. Pipeline complet en 1 clic. Resultats organises en 3 vues : Sante du site, Roadmap, Detail par page. Bouton Reecrire connecte au Pipeline Editorial. """ import asyncio from datetime import datetime import streamlit as st from hermes.core.audit_entry import resolve_entry_urls from hermes.core.audit_workflow import run_audit_pipeline # â”€â”€â”€ Helpers "Pourquoi ce score" â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ def _explain_seo_score(s, page) -> None: """Explique le score SEO en langage clair.""" score = s.seo_onpage.score issues = s.seo_onpage.weaknesses or [] strengths = s.seo_onpage.strengths or [] st.caption(f"**SEO ({score}/100) :** {' '.join(strengths) if strengths else 'Evaluation technique de la page.'}") if issues: for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") st.caption(f" _La page a {getattr(page, 'word_count', 0) or '?'} mots, {len(getattr(page, 'h2_list', []))} H2, {getattr(page, 'images_total', 0)} images ({getattr(page, 'images_with_alt', 0)} avec alt)_") def _explain_quality_score(s, page) -> None: score = s.quality.score issues = s.quality.weaknesses or [] st.caption(f"**Qualite editoriale ({score}/100)**") for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") wc = getattr(page, 'word_count', 0) or 0 if wc < 300: st.caption(f" _Contenu tres court ({wc} mots). Minimum recommande : 300 pour une page standard, 800 pour un article._") elif wc < 800: st.caption(f" _Contenu leger ({wc} mots). En dessous de 800 mots, la page peine a demontrer son expertise._") def _explain_aeo_score(s, page) -> None: score = s.aeo.score issues = s.aeo.weaknesses or [] h2s = getattr(page, 'h2_list', []) or [] faq_h2 = any('faq' in h.lower() or 'question' in h.lower() for h in h2s) st.caption(f"**AEO ({score}/100) :** Optimisation pour les moteurs de reponse IA (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews)") for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") if not faq_h2 and score < 40: tp = s.aeo.strengths or [] if any('FAQ' in t for t in tp): st.caption(f" _Note : l'absence de FAQ est moins penalisante car les concurrents n'en ont pas non plus (source SERP)_") def _explain_geo_score(s, page) -> None: score = s.geo.score issues = s.geo.weaknesses or [] ext_links = getattr(page, 'external_links', 0) or 0 st.caption(f"**GEO ({score}/100) :** Capacite a etre cite par les IA generatives") for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") st.caption(f" _La page a {ext_links} liens sortants. Au-dela de 3 liens vers des sources d'autorite, le score GEO augmente._") def _explain_eeat_score(s, page) -> None: score = s.eea_t.score issues = s.eea_t.weaknesses or [] has_author = getattr(page, 'author_detected', False) st.caption(f"**EEAT ({score}/16) :** Expertise, Experience, Autorite, Fiabilite â€” criteres Google pour les sujets sensibles") for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") if not has_author: st.caption(f" _Auteur non identifie. Ajouter un nom + bio ameliore le score de 2-3 points._") def _explain_ux_score(s, page) -> None: score = s.ux.score issues = s.ux.weaknesses or [] has_viewport = getattr(page, 'has_viewport', False) has_cta = getattr(page, 'has_cta', False) st.caption(f"**UX ({score}/100) :** Lisibilite, experience utilisateur, accessibilite") for iss in issues[:3]: st.caption(f" â€¢ {iss}") if not has_viewport: st.caption(f" _Pas de viewport detecte â€” la page n'est probablement pas responsive._") if not has_cta: st.caption(f" _Aucun CTA detecte. Un appel a l'action (bouton, formulaire) ameliore l'experience utilisateur._") def _run_audit_sync(urls, site_url, mode): return asyncio.run(run_audit_pipeline(urls=urls, site_url=site_url, mode=mode)) def render_audit_page(): """Point d'entree de la page Audit de Contenu.""" if "audit_done" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.audit_done = False if "audit_result" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.audit_result = None st.markdown('

Audit de Contenu

', unsafe_allow_html=True) st.caption("Analysez vos pages existantes sur 7 dimensions SEO / AEO / GEO / EEAT / UX.") mode_labels = { "single": "URL unique", "list": "Liste d'URLs", "sitemap": "Sitemap XML (auto-detection)", "crawl": "Crawl BFS (page d'accueil)", "csv": "Import CSV", } mode_choice = st.selectbox("Mode d'entree", options=list(mode_labels.keys()), format_func=lambda x: mode_labels[x]) input_value = "" if mode_choice == "single": input_value = st.text_input("URL de la page a auditer", placeholder="https://mon-site.fr/page") elif mode_choice == "list": input_value = st.text_area("URLs (une par ligne)", placeholder="https://mon-site.fr\nhttps://mon-site.fr/blog") elif mode_choice == "sitemap": input_value = st.text_input("URL du site", placeholder="https://mon-site.fr", help="Sitemap detecte automatiquement") elif mode_choice == "crawl": input_value = st.text_input("Page d'accueil du site", placeholder="https://mon-site.fr") elif mode_choice == "csv": input_value = st.text_area("Contenu du CSV (colonne 'url' obligatoire)", placeholder="url\nhttps://mon-site.fr", help="Collez votre CSV") with st.expander("Options avancees", expanded=False): col1, col2 = st.columns(2) with col1: max_urls = st.number_input("Nombre max d'URLs", min_value=1, max_value=5000, value=50, step=10) with col2: audit_mode = st.selectbox("Mode qualite", options=["fast", "standard", "premium", "debug"], index=1) col1, col2, col3 = st.columns([2, 1, 1]) with col1: launch = st.button("Lancer l'audit", type="primary", use_container_width=True, disabled=not input_value) if launch and input_value: st.session_state.audit_done = False st.session_state.audit_result = None progress_bar = st.progress(0, text="Resolution des URLs...") status_text = st.empty() result = asyncio.run(resolve_entry_urls(mode=mode_choice, input_value=input_value, max_urls=max_urls)) if not result["success"]: st.error(result["error"]); st.stop() urls = result["urls"]; site_url = result["site_url"] status_text.info(f"{len(urls)} URLs resolues") progress_bar.progress(0, text="Lancement du pipeline..."); status_text.text("Audit en cours...") with st.spinner(""): start_time = datetime.now() audit_result = _run_audit_sync(urls, site_url, audit_mode) elapsed = (datetime.now() - start_time).total_seconds() progress_bar.progress(1.0, text="Termine !") status_text.success(f"Audit termine en {elapsed:.0f}s â€” {len(audit_result.crawled_pages)} pages analysees") st.session_state.audit_done = True; st.session_state.audit_result = audit_result if st.session_state.audit_done and st.session_state.audit_result: result = st.session_state.audit_result st.markdown("---"); st.markdown("## Resultats de l'audit") total = len(result.crawled_pages) avg_score = int(sum(s.global_score for s in result.scores.values()) / max(1, len(result.scores))) if result.scores else 0 # â”€â”€â”€ VUE 1 : SANTE DU SITE Now I have a comprehensive view of the audit display UX. Let me analyze it based on the user's questions:

1. **"Est-ce que l'utilisateur peut comprendre parfaitement ce qui est, l'Ã©valuation de son site ?"**
   - YES - The "SantÃ© du site" view shows: pages audited, average score, cannibalization, briefs ready, pages to rewrite
   - CMS detection is shown
   - Average scores by dimension (SEO, QualitÃ©, AEO, GEO, EEAT, UX)
   - Alerts for weak pages

2. **"Pourquoi il a ces notes ?"**
   - YES - "Pourquoi ces scores ?" expander with detailed explanations per dimension
   - Each dimension has helpers that explain in plain language
   - For EEAT: explains the 16-point scale
   - For AEO: explains relationship with SERP context ("l'absence de FAQ est moins penalisante car les concurrents n'en ont pas non plus")

3. **"Si elles sont pertinentes en fonction du type de site ?"**
   - PARTIALLY - There's type-aware recommendations (no FAQ for homepage, etc.) but the classification of page types ("accueil", "produits", "articles") doesn't yet influence the SCORE explanations. The CMS detection is shown but doesn't contextualize the scores enough. A PrestaShop e-commerce site shouldn't be judged the same way as a blog.

4. **"Est-ce qu'il sait quoi faire, Ã  la fois de faÃ§on globale, Ã  la fois Ã  l'Ã©chelle de chaque page unique ?"**
   - YES for global: Roadmap priorisÃ©e (P1 Ã  rÃ©Ã©crire, P2 Ã  enrichir, P3 rÃ©visions mineures, P4 Ã  conserver)
   - YES for per-page: Each page has forces, faiblesses, recommandations with priority and effort estimate
   - "RÃ©Ã©crire cette page" button sends to the Generator

**What could be improved:**

1. **Type-aware context in scores** - The CMS type and page type should influence how scores are interpreted. For a PrestaShop product page with 50-100 words, the score is 30-34/100, but that might be NORMAL for an e-commerce product page. The user should see: "Score 30/100 â€” normal pour une fiche produit e-commerce. La moyenne pour ce type de page est de 25-35."

2. **Global summary per page type** - Instead of one global average, show averages by page type (products, articles, homepage) so the user knows that products naturally score lower.

3. **CMS-specific recommendations** - For PrestaShop: "Activez le module SEO de PrestaShop", "Utilisez un module de rich snippets", etc.

4. **The "Pourquoi ces scores ?" section could be more prominent** - Currently it's inside a nested expander.

The biggest gap is: **scores are absolute (0-100) but e-commerce product pages will NEVER score 80+**. We need **contextualized scoring** or at least **type-aware score interpretation**.

file.content:
# â”€â”€â”€ VUE 3 : DETAIL PAR PAGE + BOUTON REECRIRE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        st.markdown("---"); st.markdown("### Detail par page")
        for page in result.crawled_pages:
            if page.fetch_error: continue
            s = result.scores.get(page.url)
            brief = result.briefs.get(page.url)
            if not s: continue
            emoji = "P1" if s.global_score < 50 else "P2" if s.global_score < 75 else "P3" if s.global_score < 90 else "P4"
            with st.expander(f"[{emoji}] {page.url[:80]} â€” {s.global_score}/100"):
                m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, m7 = st.columns(7)
                with m1: st.metric("SEO", s.seo_onpage.score)
                with m2: st.metric("Qualite", s.quality.score)
                with m3: st.metric("AEO", s.aeo.score)
                with m4: st.metric("GEO", s.geo.score)
                with m5: st.metric("EEAT", f"{s.eea_t.score}/16")
                with m6: st.metric("UX", s.ux.score)
                with m7: st.metric("Transp.", s.transparency.score)
                # Radar chart
                import plotly.graph_objects as go
                cats = ['SEO', 'Qualite', 'AEO', 'GEO', 'EEAT', 'UX']
                vals = [s.seo_onpage.score, s.quality.score, s.aeo.score, s.geo.score, s.eea_t.score * 6.25, s.ux.score]
                fig = go.Figure()
                fig.add_trace(go.Scatterpolar(r=vals, theta=cats, fill='toself', line=dict(color='#1E88E5', width=2), fillcolor='rgba(30,136,229,0.2)'))
                fig.update_layout(polar=dict(radialaxis=dict(range=[0, 100], showticklabels=False)), showlegend=False, height=250, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=20, b=20))
                st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)
                # Pourquoi ce score ? â€” breakdown detaille
                with st.expander("Pourquoi ces scores ?"):
                    _explain_seo_score(s, page)
                    _explain_quality_score(s, page)
                    _explain_aeo_score(s, page)
                    _explain_geo_score(s, page)
                    _explain_eeat_score(s, page)
                    _explain_ux_score(s, page)
                # Contexte SERP (RankParse DA, volume)
                serp = getattr(page, 'serp_context', None) or {}
                feas = serp.get('feasibility', {}) if serp else {}
                if feas and feas.get('score'):
                    st.markdown("---")
                    st.markdown("### Faisabilite SEO (vs concurrence)")
                    fea1, fea2, fea3 = st.columns(3)
                    with fea1: st.metric("DA du site", f"{feas.get('site_da', '?')}/100")
                    with fea2: st.metric("DA moyen top 10", f"{feas.get('avg_top_da', '?')}/100")
                    with fea3: st.metric("Faisabilite", f"{feas.get('score', '?')}%", delta=feas.get('label', ''))
                    st.caption(feas.get('reco', ''))
                    if feas.get('top_das'):
                        st.caption(f"DA concurrents: {', '.join(str(d) for d in feas['top_das'][:5])}")
                if brief:
                    cf1, cf2 = st.columns(2)
                    with cf1:
                        st.markdown("**Forces**")
                        for f in brief.forces[:5]: st.markdown(f"- {f}")
                    with cf2:
                        st.markdown("**Faiblesses**")
                        for f in brief.faiblesses[:5]: st.markdown(f"- {f}")
                    if brief.recommandations:
                        st.markdown("**Recommandations :**")
                        for r in brief.recommandations[:3]:
                            st.markdown(f"- [{r.priorite}] {r.description} ({r.effort_estime})")
                # BOUTON REECRIRE
                rcol1, rcol2 = st.columns([2, 1])

input.command:
cd "C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo" && python -c "
import asyncio, logging, sys, os
os.environ['AUDIT_DRY_RUN'] = '1'
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)
logging.getLogger('hermes').setLevel(logging.INFO)

async def test():
    from hermes.core.audit_entry import resolve_entry_urls
    from hermes.core.audit_workflow import run_audit_pipeline
    
    print('=== Resolution URLs ===')
    result = await resolve_entry_urls('sitemap', 'https://www.hartmann-tresore.fr', max_urls=5)
    print(f'Success: {result[\"success\"]}, URLs: {len(result[\"urls\"])}')
    if result['error']:
        print(f'Error: {result[\"error\"]}')
        return
    print(f'Types: {result[\"type_distribution\"]}')
    
    print()
    print('=== Audit Pipeline (dry-run) ===')
    audit = await run_audit_pipeline(
        urls=result['urls'],
        site_url=result['site_url'],
        mode='standard',
        dry_run=True,
    )
    
    cms = getattr(audit.crawled_pages[0], 'cms_detected', '') if audit.crawled_pages else ''
    print(f'Pages crawled: {len(audit.crawled_pages)}')
    print(f'CMS detected: {cms}')
    print(f'Scores computed: {len(audit.scores)}')
    print(f'Cannibalization pairs: {len(audit.cannibalisation)}')
    print(f'Briefs: {len(audit.briefs)}')
    
    # Show sample scores
    for url, s in list(audit.scores.items())[:3]:
        from urllib.parse import urlparse
        path = urlparse(url).path
        print(f'  {path[:60]}: global={s.global_score}/100 SEO={s.seo_onpage.score} Qual={s.quality.score} AEO={s.aeo.score} GEO={s.geo.score} EEAT={s.eea_t.score}/16')
    
    print()
    print('=== SUCCESS ===')

asyncio.run(test())
" 2>&1

asyncio.run(test())

## RÃ©sumÃ©

### Le `/compact` n'a rien cassÃ©
Il a simplement rÃ©sumÃ© l'historique de la conversation prÃ©cÃ©dente pour libÃ©rer de l'espace mÃ©moire. Tu m'as donnÃ© le recap manuellement parce que c'est mieux qu'un rÃ©sumÃ© automatique. Aucun fichier touchÃ©.

### 4 corrections apportÃ©es

| Fichier | Correction |
|---------|-----------|
| `hermes/agents/audit/ac01b_serp_context.py` | SupprimÃ© les 2 lignes dupliquÃ©es qui annulaient le cache SERP â€” chaque mot-clÃ© est maintenant cherchÃ© 1 seule fois |
| `hermes/connectors/cms_detector.py` | Ajout du `User-Agent` (le site bloquait 403), ajout des signaux PrestaShop (CSS class, robots.txt, footer), correction du pattern cookie trop strict. **RÃ©sultat : PrestaShop dÃ©tectÃ© Ã  95%** au lieu de 0% |
| `hermes/connectors/keywordseverywhere_connector.py` | Auto-dÃ©sactive l'API aprÃ¨s le 1er HTTP 402/401/403 â€” fini le spam de 20 warnings par audit |
| `hermes/connectors/sitemap_parser.py` + `pages/audit_page.py` | Classification d'URLs PrestaShop (1 accueil + 1 article + 18 produits au lieu de "autres"), nouveau bandeau "Comment lire ces scores ?" avec fourchettes attendues par type de page + CMS, et indicateur par page (âœ“ dans la fourchette / â–² au-dessus / â–¼ en dessous) |

### Test en local sur hartmann-tresore.fr
- âœ“ Sitemap PrestaShop dÃ©tectÃ© (`/1_index_sitemap.xml`)
- âœ“ 255 URLs extraites, 20 filtrÃ©es correctement
- âœ“ Pipeline d'audit complet OK : 3 pages crawlÃ©es, scores 30-34/100 (cohÃ©rents pour des fiches produits e-commerce)
- âœ“ CMS PrestaShop affichÃ© dans le rapport

**Pour les thÃ¨mes personnalisÃ©s** : la dÃ©tection via `robots.txt` (qui ne dÃ©pend pas du thÃ¨me) reste fiable, et plusieurs signaux indÃ©pendants (header, HTML, cookie, sitemap pattern) augmentent la robustesse.

Veux-tu que je commit ces changements et dÃ©ploie ?

file.content:
async def run(state: AuditSessionState) -> AuditSessionState:
    """Enrichit l'audit avec le contexte SERP pour chaque page."""
    state.current_agent = "ac01b"

    # Cache evite de rappeler KE/DataForSEO pour chaque page
    kw_cache = {}

    for page in state.crawled_pages:
        if page.fetch_error:
            continue

        keyword = _extract_keyword_from_page(page)
        if not keyword:
            continue

        # Utiliser le cache si le mot-cle a deja ete traite
        kw_key = keyword.lower().strip()
        if kw_key in kw_cache:
            serp_context = kw_cache[kw_key]
        else:
            logger.info(f"AC01b: SERP context for '{keyword}'")
            serp_context = await _get_serp_context(keyword)
            kw_cache[kw_key] = serp_context

        # Appliquer les ajustements aux scores existants
        s = state.scores.get(page.url)
        if s:
            adj = _apply_serp_adjustments(
                {"quality": s.quality.score, "seo": s.seo_onpage.score,
                 "aeo": s.aeo.score, "geo": s.geo.score},
                serp_context,
                page.word_count,
            )
            s.quality.score = max(0, min(100, s.quality.score + adj["quality"]))

 """

 from datetime import datetime
 from html.parser import HTMLParser
 
@@ -137,6 +139,76 @@ def _build_user_message(state: SessionState) -> str:
     )
 
 
+def _geo_fallback(state: SessionState) -> GeoData:
+    """Fallback heuristique quand le LLM GEO renvoie des tableaux vides.
+
+    Extrait les entites du brouillon et genere des sources/suggestions
+    de base a partir du mot-cle et du secteur.
+    """
+    keyword = state.keyword or ""
+    html = state.brouillon_html or ""
+    secteur = state.config.secteur or "autre"
+    type_page = state.type_page or "article"
+
+    # Entites nommees : patterns de noms propres et organisations
+    entites = set()
+    # Capitalized words (2+ mots) = potentiellement des entites
+    for match in re.finditer(r"\b([A-Z][a-zÃ Ã¢Ã¤Ã©Ã¨ÃªÃ«Ã®Ã¯Ã´Ã¶Ã¹Ã»Ã¼Ã¿]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-zÃ Ã¢Ã¤Ã©Ã¨ÃªÃ«Ã®Ã¯Ã´Ã¶Ã¹Ã»Ã¼Ã¿]+){1,4})\b", html):
+        e = match.group(1).strip()
+        if len(e) > 5 and len(e) < 80 and not any(w in e.lower() for w in ("Contenu", "Cette", "Dans", "Vous", "Nous", "Guide", "Complet", "Conseil")):
+            entites.add(e)
+        if len(entites) >= 15:
+            break
+    entites_list = list(entites)[:10]
+    if not entites_list:
+        entites_list = [keyword.title()]
+
+    # Sources primaires : suggestions sectorielles

**AprÃ¨s** : suppression des lignes dupliquÃ©es. Chaque mot-clÃ© n'est plus interrogÃ© qu'une fois par session.

### 2. DÃ©tection CMS â€” 0% â†’ 95% (`hermes/connectors/cms_detector.py`)

**Plusieurs bugs combinÃ©s** :

| Bug | Impact | Correction |
|-----|--------|-----------|

- AprÃ¨s : `CMS: PrestaShop (95%)` â€” 3 signaux dÃ©tectÃ©s indÃ©pendants

```python
# Ajout d'un flag de dÃ©sactivation persistant pour la session
```

input.command:
cd "C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo" && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix CMS detection + UX scoring context for PrestaShop audits

5 corrections sur le Pipeline Audit de Contenu, identifiees apres
le test reel sur hartmann-tresore.fr (PrestaShop e-commerce, 20 pages) :

1. ac01b_serp_context: suppression du doublon qui annulait le cache SERP
2. cms_detector: User-Agent + logger + signaux PrestaShop renforces + lecture
   robots.txt -> detection passe de 0% a 95%
3. keywordseverywhere: auto-desactivation apres HTTP 401/402/403 -> fini le
   spam de 20 warnings par audit
4. sitemap_parser: classification URLs PrestaShop (/123-slug.html -> produits,

content.text:
Voici le rapport complet d'exploration du codebase Hermes SEO.

---

## RAPPORT D'EXPLORATION -- Pipeline 3 (Audit Technique)

### 1. Connecteurs disponibles et leurs patterns

Le dossier `hermes/connectors/` contient **9 fichiers actifs** (+ `__init__.py`):

| Fichier | Lignes | API / Cout | Pattern | Methode d'auth |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gsc_connector.py` | 246 | Google Search Console (gratuit) | async class singleton | OAuth 2.0 refresh token (httpx) |
| `dataforseo_connector.py` | 228 | DataForSEO v3 ($0.01-0.05/appel) | async class singleton | HTTP Basic Auth |
| `rankparse_connector.py` | 135 | RankParse (~$0.009/credit) | async class singleton | X-API-Key header |
| `keywordseverywhere_connector.py` | 136 | Keywords Everywhere ($0.01/credit) | async class singleton | Bearer token |
| `serp_api.py` | 246 | TalorData / Scrape.do / Serpstack | async class (dry_run mode) | Bearer / key param / access_key |
| `sitemap_parser.py` | 355 | Gratuit (httpx + BS4) | async BFS functions | Aucune |
| `cms_detector.py` | 246 | Gratuit (headers + regex) | async function | Aucune |
| `site_scraper.py` | 176 | Gratuit (httpx + BS4) | async function | Aucune |
| `keyword_aggregator.py` | 162 | DataForSEO > KE > pytrends | async functions | Delegue aux connecteurs |

**Pattern commun a tous les connecteurs :**
- Classe avec `is_configured` property (bool)
- Methode `_get_env(key)` qui appelle `config._cfg._resolve(key)`
- Singleton en bas de fichier (ex: `gsc = GSCConnector()`)
- Tous utilisent `httpx.AsyncClient` avec timeout 15-30s
- Gestion d'erreur avec `logger.warning()` et retour `{}` ou `None` en echec

**Ce qui manque pour Pipeline 3 :**
- Aucun connecteur PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse
- Aucun connecteur Playwright/puppeteer (rendering JS)
- Aucun connecteur security headers check
- Aucun connecteur de validation hreflang
- Aucun connecteur schema.org validator (SDTT)

---

### 2. Capacites GSC disponibles

Le `GSCConnector` (`C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\connectors\gsc_connector.py`) expose **4 methodes** :

- `query(site_url, start_date, end_date, dimensions, row_limit)` -- requete generique avec dimensions (query, page, country, device). Retourne `[{clicks, impressions, ctr, position, query, page}]`. Limite max 25k rows.
- `get_url_performance(site_url, page_url, days)` -- performance d'une URL specifique avec filtre page. Retourne `{clicks, impressions, ctr, position_moyenne, top_queries}`.
- `list_sites()` -- liste les sites accessibles.
- `check_indexation(site_url, page_url)` -- URL Inspection API. Verifie coverage_state, last_crawled, robots_txt, sitemap.

**Ce qui manque :**
- Les donnees de GSC sont deja utilisables pour Pipeline 3, mais le connecteur n'expose pas encore les dimensions `device` et `country` en routine. Le rendu JS et les Core Web Vitals (CrUX) ne sont pas disponibles via GSC seul.
- Le connecteur n'a pas de methode directe pour recuperer le sitemap indexe dans GSC (le sitemap detecte est fait via `sitemap_parser.py`).

---

### 3. Outils OSS deja catalogues pour Pipeline 3

Le fichier `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\tools\README.md` catalogue **21 outils OSS**. Ceux qui correspondent directement a Pipeline 3 :

**Deja installes (reutilisables directement) :**
- `textstat` (0.7.13) -- Flesch multilingue, VA deja dans AC06
- `protego` (0.6.1) -- robots.txt parser Google-compatible, VA deja dans sitemap_parser.py (import note mais pas systematique)
- `yake` (0.7.3) -- Extraction mots-cles (utilite pour diversite lexicale)
- `schorg` (0.7.5) -- Schema.org Pydantic models

**Catalogues comme "A Installer" pour Pipeline Audit Technique :**
- `crawlee` (1.7.2) -- Crawler avec JS rendering, robots.txt, sitemap
- `advertools` (0.17) -- Kit SEO complet (sitemaps, robots, logs, keywords)
- `mcp-seo` (0.3.0) -- 18 MCP tools dont Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals
- `seokar` (1.0.0) -- Analyse on-page, score sante 0-100%
- `ultimate-sitemap-parser` (1.7) -- Parser sitemap XML (1M URLs teste)

**Catalogues comme "Autres Utilitaires" :**
- `langchain-hreflang` (0.1.0) -- Validation hreflang

**Non catalogues mais necessaires pour Pipeline 3 :**
- `scikit-network` -- Pour PageRank interne et analyse de graphe (dans seotools mais pas en dependance directe)
- `playwright` -- Pour le rendering JS avance (l'alternative a crawlee)
- `google-api-python-client` -- Pour PageSpeed Insights API (ou httpx direct)
- `cssutils` ou `tinycss2` -- Pour analyse CSS responsive

---

### 4. Existants pour securite, performance, schemas, hreflang, mobile

#### Securite / Headers
**Aucun code existant** pour les en-tetes de securite (X-Frame-Options, CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options). Cela doit etre cree de zero.

#### Performance
**Aucun code existant.** Aucune reference a PageSpeed Insights, Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals, LCP, FID/INP, CLS dans les fichiers source.

#### Schema.org
**Code existant tres mature** dans deux endroits :
1. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\agent_21_schema_org.py` -- Generation de JSON-LD avec 9 templates (Article, Product, FAQPage, LocalBusiness, NewsArticle, WebPage + variantes). 100% deterministe, pas de LLM. Utilise `schorg` comme dependance Pydantic.
2. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac01_crawler.py` (lignes 145-162) -- Detection de JSON-LD et microdata existants sur les pages auditees. Extrait les `@type` et signale `json_ld_valid`.
3. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac02_seo_quality.py` -- Scoring de la presence schema.org (+7pts si present).

**Pour Pipeline 3 :** La detection cote AC01 est reutilisable, mais il n'y a pas de validation de la conformite syntaxique des schemas (schema.org validator), pas de detection d'erreurs structurelles, et pas d'analyse multi-page de la couverture schema.

#### Hreflang
**Code existant mais tres partiel** dans :
1. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\agent_20_localisation.py` (lignes 53-64) -- Generation de balises hreflang basique (parcours d'une liste de locales). Manque la validation croisee, la detection d'erreurs (canonical conflict, missing return tags, hreflang pointing to non-existent pages).
2. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\tools\README.md` -- `langchain-hreflang` deja catalogue comme outil a installer.
3. Les balises `link rel="alternate" hreflang` ne sont **pas detectees** par AC01 (aucune extraction dans `_extract_signals`).

**Pour Pipeline 3 :** Agent 20 ne couvre que la generation, pas l'audit. La detection et la validation hreflang doivent etre creees.

#### Mobile / Viewport
**Detection existante dans :**
1. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac01_crawler.py` ligne 193 : `signals["has_viewport"] = bool(soup.find("meta", attrs={"name": "viewport"}))`
2. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\models\audit.py` ligne 73 : `has_viewport: bool = False` dans CrawledPage
3. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac06_ux.py` ligne 89 : `if page.has_viewport: score += 3`
4. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac01_crawler.py` ligne 194 : `signals["is_amp"]` detection AMP

**Pour Pipeline 3 :** La detection de `has_viewport` est un booleen basique. Il manque l'analyse du contenu du viewport (width=device-width, initial-scale, etc.), le test de la meta `supported-color-schemes`, les CSS media queries, les breakpoints, le touch-target sizing. Les tests de rendu mobile via Playwright/Lighthouse sont entierement a creer.

---

### 5. Dependances existantes

**requirements.txt** (`C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\requirements.txt`) -- Deja installees :
```
streamlit, pydantic, loguru, tenacity, httpx, python-dotenv, pyyaml, rich
chromadb, langgraph, langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite
anthropic, openai, tiktoken, protobuf
json-repair, textstat, yake, schorg
```

**pyproject.toml** (`C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\pyproject.toml`) -- Meme liste + `python-wordpress-xmlrpc`, optional-dependencies `shopify-api-py` et `pytest`

**Dependances a ajouter pour Pipeline 3 :** (justifiees ci-dessous)

| Dependance | Raison | Alternative existante |
|---|---|---|
| `scikit-network>=0.31` | PageRank interne, clustering de pages, analyse de graphe | Aucune |
| `playwright>=1.40` | Rendu JS, screenshot, detection contenu dynamique, test responsive | Crawlee (catalogue dans tools/README) |
| `advertools>=0.17` | Analyse logs serveur, extraction keywords, robots.txt avance | Aucune (le sitemap_parser.py est artisanal) |
| `seokar>=1.0.0` | Score sante SEO 0-100%, check on-page avance | Aucune |
| `google-api-python-client>=2.0` | PageSpeed Insights API (ou httpx direct) | httpx (deja installe) |
| `langchain-hreflang>=0.1.0` | Validation hreflang | Aucune (agent_20 ne fait que generation) |
| `cssutils>=2.7` | Analyse CSS : media queries, responsive breakpoints | Aucune |
| `beautifulsoup4` (deja) | Parsing HTML | Deja utilise dans site_scraper, sitemap_parser, ac01 |

---

### 6. Architecture du Pipeline Audit existant (reutilisable)

Le pipeline "Audit de Contenu" existant (AC01-AC10) dans `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit/` suit cet ordre via LangGraph :

```
ac00 (superviseur) -> ac01 (crawler) -> ac01b (SERP context) -> ac02 (SEO quality) 
-> ac03 (AEO) -> ac04 (GEO) -> ac05 (EEAT) -> ac06 (UX) -> ac10 (Delta DOM) 
-> ac07 (cannibalisation) -> ac08 (synthesis) -> ac09 (roadmap)
```

**Ce qui est deja reutilisable pour Pipeline 3 :**
- `ac01_crawler.py` -- _extract_signals() extrait deja 55+ signaux (meta, Hn, contenu, images, liens, schema, viewport, AMP, dates, auteur). Les patterns BS4 sont directement copiables.
- `ac09_delta_dom.py` -- Analyse contenu cache CSS, detection white-on-white, keyword stuffing, analyse d'images. 3 couches de transparence directement reutilisables.
- Le pattern `AuditSessionState` + `CrawledPage` Pydantic models dans `models/audit.py` -- Structuration propre, champ `technique` manquant (a etendre pour Pipeline 3).
- `audit_workflow.py` -- Orchestration LangGraph, build_audit_graph() pattern a copier.

**Ce qui est DIFFERENT pour Pipeline 3 vs Audit de Contenu :**
- Pipeline 3 crawle tout le site (pas juste les URLs fournies)
- Pipeline 3 a besoin de rendering JS (Playwright)
- Pipeline 3 verifie les headers HTTP (pas juste le HTML)
- Pipeline 3 mesure la performance (PageSpeed, Core Web Vitals)
- Pipeline 3 valide les schemas, hreflang, sitemaps a l'echelle du site

---

### 7. Guardrails existants (reutilisables pour Pipeline 3)

| Fichier | Objet | Reutilisable pour Pipeline 3 ? |
|---|---|---|
| `core/guard.py` | Injection prompt + blocked keywords + validation URL | Oui - URL validation (sanitize+validate_url) |
| `core/pipeline_guard.py` | Critical agents, degradation, error summary | Non - trop lie au pipeline editorial |
| `core/content_guard.py` | Pre-publication: contenu interne, claims non sources, placeholders, structure | Oui - `check_structure()` patterns de sections |
| `core/llm_guard.py` | Anti-hallucination: factual inventory, cross-check, page-type aware | Non - specifique au LLM editorial |

---

### 8. Resume des fichiers cles identifies

**Fichiers a lire/modifier pour Pipeline 3 :**
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\connectors\gsc_connector.py` -- Deja existant, complet
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\connectors\sitemap_parser.py` -- Deja existant, a enrichir pour Pipeline 3
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac01_crawler.py` -- Pattern BS4 a copier
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac09_delta_dom.py` -- Analyse transparence a reutiliser
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\models\audit.py` -- CrawledPage + AuditSessionState a etendre
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\core\audit_workflow.py` -- Pattern LangGraph a copier pour le nouveau pipeline
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\tools\README.md` -- Catalogue OSS a mettre a jour apres installation
- `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\pyproject.toml` -- Dependances a ajouter

**Fichiers a creer (nouveaux pour Pipeline 3) :**
- `hermes/connectors/pagespeed_connector.py` -- Interface PageSpeed Insights API
- `hermes/connectors/security_headers_checker.py` -- Analyse headers HTTP securite
- `hermes/agents/audit_technique/` -- 10 nouveaux agents techniques
- `hermes/core/audit_technique_workflow.py` -- Nouveau graphe LangGraph
- `hermes/models/audit_technique.py` -- Nouveaux modeles Pydantic

---

Ce rapport couvre l'integralite des fichiers demandes. La base de code Hermes est bien structuree avec des patterns clairs (connecteurs async httpx + singletons, orchestration LangGraph, models Pydantic, scoring deterministe). Environ 60% de l'infrastructure existante (patterns, connecteurs, guards) est reutilisable; le reste (40%, notamment la performance, la securite, le rendu JS et la validation echelle-site) est a creer.

2. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\models\audit.py` ligne 73 : `has_viewport: bool = False` dans CrawledPage

4. `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\agents\audit\ac01_crawler.py` ligne 194 : `signals["is_amp"]` detection AMP

**Pour Pipeline 3 :** La detection de `has_viewport` est un booleen basique. Il manque l'analyse du contenu du viewport (width=device-width, initial-scale, etc.), le test de la meta `supported-color-schemes`, les CSS media queries, les breakpoints, le touch-target sizing. Les tests de rendu mobile via Playwright/Lighthouse sont entierement a creer.

| `beautifulsoup4` (deja) | Parsing HTML | Deja utilise dans site_scraper, sitemap_parser, ac01 |
